description_long: This is a male security guard dressed in a tactical uniform, featuring a black bulletproof vest over a camouflage-patterned shirt with short sleeves. He wears dark cargo pants tucked into sturdy black boots, and his hands are covered with fingerless gloves. His head is protected by a black cap, and his face is partially covered with a red bandana or mask. The vest is adorned with metallic studs and pouches, suggesting readiness for urban patrol or crowd control. Visible tattoos on his arms and a muscular build contribute to an imposing presence, while the overall attire is utilitarian and designed for both protection and mobility.
description: A muscular male security guard in a tactical black vest, camouflage shirt, cargo pants, boots, and a black cap with a red face covering.
description_view_0: Front view shows the security guard's facial covering, tactical vest with pouches, camouflage shirt, and fingerless gloves.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the arm tattoos, profile of the cap, and the layered look of the vest and pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the vest, the fit of the cargo pants, and the back of the boots and cap.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing arm tattoos, glove details, and the side profile of the uniform.
attribute_uniform_type: The security guard wears a black tactical vest with metallic studs and pouches over a short-sleeved camouflage shirt, dark cargo pants, black fingerless gloves, sturdy black boots, and a black cap. A red bandana or mask covers the lower half of his face, and visible tattoos are present on his arms. The uniform is utilitarian, informal, and designed for urban security duties, with a focus on protection and mobility.
attribute_posture: Standing upright with arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, projecting readiness and alertness.
